burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; chronic sicca symptoms and fatigue

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Sicca symptoms with anti-SSA/SSB or salivary gland biopsy; Schirmer test and salivary flow

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with symptomatic management and specialist care

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Rheumatology pathways with autoantibody testing and biopsy
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Artificial tears/saliva, pilocarpine, hydroxychloroquine for systemic symptoms; monitor lymphoma risk
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Chronic fatigue management and comorbid autoimmunity
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong rheumatology services and access to diagnostic testing
